verses.text: Ka thahatna ahi Topa aw, nangmah ka hong it hi
Topa pen keima suangpi, ka munkip muan'huai, kei a hong honkhiapa, ka Pasian, ka suangpi, ka belhpa, ka lum, ka kihotkhiatna ki, ka munkip ahi hi
A phattaak Topa ka sam a, ka galte kiang panin kei hong honkhia hi
Sihna khaute in hong gakcip a, sihna tuihualte in kei hong nawk hi
Leinuai sihna khaute in kei hong kancip a, sihna thangte in kei hong dawntuah hi
Ka gimna-ah Topa ka sam a, ka Pasian' tungah huhna ngenin ka kiko hi. Amah in a biakinnpi panin ka aw hong za a, amah ka kohna aw in ama bilte va banto hi
Ama hehna hangin leitung kipumpei-in kivei a, mual bulpite zong kisingin ling damdam hi
Ama nakvangte panin meikhu pusuak hi. Ama kam panin mei husia pusuak a, ama tung panin mei-am san kuangkhia hi
Amah in vanpi niamsakin hong kumsuk a, ama khenuai-ah meiivom sahpi a om hi
Kherub khat tungah amah tuangin hong leeng a, huih khate tungah manlang takin hong leeng hi
A kimkotah a ki-umna dingin khuamial bawl a, a tung kikhuhna dingin meii sahpi leh tui tawh a ziingsak hi
Ama mai-a khuaphia sung panin gialpi leh mei-amte in ama meii sahpite a phulet hi
Topa zong vantungah awng a, Sangpenpa in gialpi leh mei-am ahi ama aw hong gingsak hi
Amah in a thaltangte lawn a, a galte kithehthangsak hi. Khuaphialep phiasak a, a galte a susia hi
Topa aw, nangma mawhsakna na awging hangin tuipi taw kidawk a, lei bulpite a guakin om hi
Amah in a sangna panin a khut tawh zamin kei hong la a, tui thukpi panin keimah hong kaikhia hi
Ka gal hatpa kiang pan leh hong mudahte kiang panin kei hong honkhia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei-a' dingin amaute hatlua uh hi
Amaute in ka kamsiat hunin kei hong nehthawh uh hangin Topa in kei hong huh hi
Amah in mun tanzau khatah kei hong paikhiatpih a, ka tungah lungkim ahih manin a hong honkhia hi
Topa in ka thumanna tawh kizui-in noptuamna hong pia a, ka siangthona tawh kizui-in hong dinkik hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' lampite ka tawn khin a, ka Pasian' kiang panin gitlohna tawh ka paikhia kei hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ama biakna ngeina thukip omte khempeuh limtakin ka zui a, ama thukhamte ka paiikhia kei hi
Ama mai-ah kawkbaang hetloin ka om a, kisuan'na dingte panin kei ka kikem hi
Tua ahih manin Topa in ka thumanna leh ama muhna-ah ka sianthona tawh kizui-in kei hong dinkik khin hi
Thuman mi tungah nang na thuman a, kawkbaanglo mi tungah nang na diktat hi
A siangtho mi tungah na siangtho gamtat a, thukawi mite na galbawl hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh mi niamte na honkhia a, ahih hangin mi kiphasakte na niamsak hi
Nangmah in keima mei nong vaksak a, Topa ka Pasian in ka khuamial na vaksak hi
Nangma hangin galkap honkhat ka sugawpzo a, ka Pasian hangin khuakulh khat ka kanzo hi
Hih Pasian — a thu kicing a, Topa' kamciamna a manna kilang hi. Amah a belte khempeuh-a' dingin kidalna lum ahi hi
Topa longal, Pasian kua hiam? Pasian longal, suangpi kua hiam
Keima tungah thahatna a hong guan' Pasian, ka lampi lungmuan'na dingin a bawlpa ahi hi
Amah in sangaipi khe bangin keima khe hong bawlsak a, mual sang dawnah ka khe hong kipsak hi
Galsim siamna dingin ka khutte hong hilh a, keima khut in sumngo thal nangawn a keekzo hi
Na hotkhiatna lum kei hong pia khinin, na taklam khut in kei hong phong a, nangma hong huhna in keimah hong liansak hi
Ka kalsuanna ding mun tanzau nong pia a, ka khe taallo hi
Ka galte delhin ka pha a, a vekpi-un a kisiat khit matengun ka ciahkik kei hi
Amaute khempeuh a thawhkik zawhlohna dingun ka sunletgawp a, ka khenuai-ah a puk uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh galdona dingin keimah tha nong guan' a, keimah a hong dote ka nuai-ah na nengniam hi
Ka galte na nungkiksak a, kei hong mudahte ka susia hi
Huhna ding ngenin amaute kikoko uh a, ahih hangin a hon' ding kuamah omlo hi. Amaute in Topa' tungah ko uh a, ahih hangin amah in dawnglo hi
Huihpi mai-ah leivui bangin amaute ka satvui a, kongzing buante bangin amaute ka lawnkhia hi
A lehdo mite kiang panin nangmah in kei na hong honkhia a, minamte' lutangin kei na hong bawl a, ka theih ngeiloh mite in keima na hong sem uh hi
Ka thu a zak phetun amaute in hong mang pah uh a, gamdang mite in kei hong mai-et uh hi
Gamdang mite lungkia uh a, a phualkip panun a lingsa-in hong paikhia uh hi
Topa hing hi. Keima suangpi in thupha ngah hen la, ka kihotkhiatna Pasian
hong thuhkik sakin keima nuai-ah mite a hong zawhsak Pasian
ka galte kiang panin keimah a hong honkhiapa minthangin vanglian ta hen. Ka langte tungah keimah nong liansak a, mi ngongtatte kiang panin na hong honkhia hi
Topa aw, hih thu hangin minam dangte lakah nang ka hong phat ding a, nangma min phatna la ka sa ding hi
Zawhna lianpi ama kumpipa tungah pia a, a sathau nilhpa David leh a suan a khakte tungah a tawntungin itna kip a lak hi.
